title: Native Epistemic Tracking for claude-sail
spec_digest: Replace Empirica MCP with native epistemic tracking. 13 vectors, rolling-average calibration, behavioral feedback, JSON+Obsidian storage, bash-only, fail-open hooks.
key_decisions: Rolling averages now, Bayesian upgrade later (data too sparse for Bayesian to earn its keep)
Behavioral instructions paired with every numeric correction
Context-sensitive calibration — project familiarity affects warnings
Keep all 13 vectors — understand before pruning
Single JSON file, no SQLite, no fragmentation
jq for computation, awk as fallback
risk_flags: user-facing behavior change (feedback format affects Claude session behavior)
